item.title: USB Drive File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Drive File Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdeletedfiles
item.itunes:summary:
USB Drive File Recovery Software
(Utilities)
How to retrieves damaged data files? Just clicks on www.pdd.co.in website and download USB Drive File Recovery Software for bringing back your crucial personal files. Use data retrieval application to regain files from various storage media and save it in original formats. Company program rescue files without taking any expert advice.

[read more]

item.title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:title: streamCapture2 [TV & Streaming]
item.itunes:author: posktomten
item.itunes:summary:
streamCapture2
(TV & Streaming)
A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

streamCapture2 is available in three languages: English, Italian and Swedish

The AppImage updates itself, you only need to download once.

https://gitlab.com/posktomten/streamcapture2/-/wikis/home (Website)

https://ceicer.eu/streamcapture2 (Svensk hemsida)

https://youtu.be/I5hJKj7TYxM?si=B-soWX--4jt1qBH- (Video)

Manual English
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_en_US.html
Manual Italian
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_it_IT.html
Manual Svensk
https://bin.ceicer.com/streamcapture2/help-current/index_sv_SE.html

Video (Swedish)
https://youtu.be/1O9CW81LOIE
[read more]

[read more]

A program to save streaming video to your computer. A graphical shell for the command line program svtplay-dl
The program works with Linux, Windows and MacOS X. The program is written in C++ and uses Qt6 (Qt5 for older linux versions) graphic library.

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:

RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.

RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:

RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrestore
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Restore
(Utilities)
Best and comprehensive Memory Card Restore software facilitates user to conveniently recover overall erased valuable files and folders stored in various file formats including png, mpeg, tiff, riff, exif, emf, wmf, mov, midi, jpeg, xml, xls, mp3, mp4, txt, ppt bmp, doc, txt, ppt, html, bitmap and many others. DDR professional data retrieval utility offer you to salvage files and folders misplaced due to any major data loss reason including software or hardware malfunctioning, improper removable storage media device handling, virus or worm attack, formatted or reformatted hard disk, power failure, improper system shutdown, Bad sector in the hard disk, accidentally deletion, missing partition and others. Memory Card Restore software enable users to restore unintentionally lost data including text documents, Microsoft word files, excel sheet, digital images, power point slide shows, favorite wallpapers, songs collection, movies, snapshots, presentation files, video clippings, party photographs and others. www.memorycardrestore.com allow users to regain entire mislaid valuable data from all type of drive including hard disk or removable storage media devices (Pen drive, digital camera, memory card, thumb drive, mobile phones, key drive, flash drive, external hard disk drive and others). Features:* GUI functionality offer users to friendly work with DDR professional data retrieval application without taking any specialized knowledge or expert training for operating.* Expertise DDR professional data rescue software enables users with enhanced feature to regain overall misplaced valuable data in minimum span of time.* Specialized data recovery program simply salvage lost data even computer system display error messages like “Drive not detected” or “Drive not recognized”.

[read more]
item.description:
Memory Card Restore
(Utilities)
Best and comprehensive Memory Card Restore software facilitates user to conveniently recover overall erased valuable files and folders stored in various file formats including png, mpeg, tiff, riff, exif, emf, wmf, mov, midi, jpeg, xml, xls, mp3, mp4, txt, ppt bmp, doc, txt, ppt, html, bitmap and many others. Features:* GUI functionality offer users to friendly work with DDR professional data retrieval application without taking any specialized knowledge or expert training for operating.* Expertise DDR professional data rescue software enables users with enhanced feature to regain overall misplaced valuable data in minimum span of time.* Specialized data recovery program simply salvage lost data even computer system display error messages like “Drive not detected” or “Drive not recognized”.

[read more]

item.title: Recover Deleted NTFS Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Deleted NTFS Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverdeletedfiles
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Deleted NTFS Files
(Utilities)
Recover Deleted NTFS Files application is capable to revive corrupted movie folder in various formats like 3gp, avi, m2ts, f4v, m4v, mkv, mp4, mpg, mts etc. User friendly and efficient data recovery software is easily provided by www.pdd.co.in site to regain damaged snapshots in minimal time period which lost by virus infection from hard disk drive supporting NTFS/NTFS5 file system and also display all information of physical or logical drive.

[read more]
item.description:

item.title: REALME MUSIC APP [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: REALME MUSIC APP [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
REALME MUSIC APP
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Realme ColorOS Music app has been successfully ported for AOSP (Android Open Source Project) ROMs, providing an enhanced music experience for users who prefer custom ROMs on their devices. This ported version brings the feature-rich and visually appealing ColorOS Music app, originally developed for Realme devices, to a wider range of Android smartphones running AOSP-based ROMs.
With the ported Realme ColorOS Music app, users can enjoy a seamless and intuitive music playback experience. The app offers a clean and user-friendly interface, allowing easy navigation and access to various music features. It provides a comprehensive library management system, enabling users to organize and categorize their music collection efficiently.

The app supports various audio formats, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of music files. Users can create custom playlists, shuffle tracks, and enjoy personalized recommendations based on their listening habits. Additionally, it offers a powerful equalizer with preset sound profiles and manual adjustments, allowing users to fine-tune their audio settings according to their preferences.

One notable feature of the ported Realme ColorOS Music app is its integration with online music services. Users can access a vast catalog of songs, stream music online, and discover new artists and albums directly within the app. It also supports downloading music for offline listening, providing flexibility for users with limited internet connectivity.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS Music app for AOSP ROMs brings the best of Realme's music experience to a wider user base. It combines an appealing user interface, advanced features, and seamless integration with online music services, enhancing the music playback capabilities of AOSP-based devices.
[read more]
item.description:
REALME MUSIC APP
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Realme ColorOS Music app has been successfully ported for AOSP (Android Open Source Project) ROMs, providing an enhanced music experience for users who prefer custom ROMs on their devices. This ported version brings the feature-rich and visually appealing ColorOS Music app, originally developed for Realme devices, to a wider range of Android smartphones running AOSP-based ROMs.
With the ported Realme ColorOS Music app, users can enjoy a seamless and intuitive music playback experience. The app offers a clean and user-friendly interface, allowing easy navigation and access to various music features. It provides a comprehensive library management system, enabling users to organize and categorize their music collection efficiently.

The app supports various audio formats, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of music files. Users can create custom playlists, shuffle tracks, and enjoy personalized recommendations based on their listening habits. Additionally, it offers a powerful equalizer with preset sound profiles and manual adjustments, allowing users to fine-tune their audio settings according to their preferences.

One notable feature of the ported Realme ColorOS Music app is its integration with online music services. Users can access a vast catalog of songs, stream music online, and discover new artists and albums directly within the app. It also supports downloading music for offline listening, providing flexibility for users with limited internet connectivity.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS Music app for AOSP ROMs brings the best of Realme's music experience to a wider user base. It combines an appealing user interface, advanced features, and seamless integration with online music services, enhancing the music playback capabilities of AOSP-based devices.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
REALME MUSIC APP
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
The Realme ColorOS Music app has been successfully ported for AOSP (Android Open Source Project) ROMs, providing an enhanced music experience for users who prefer custom ROMs on their devices. This ported version brings the feature-rich and visually appealing ColorOS Music app, originally developed for Realme devices, to a wider range of Android smartphones running AOSP-based ROMs.
With the ported Realme ColorOS Music app, users can enjoy a seamless and intuitive music playback experience. The app offers a clean and user-friendly interface, allowing easy navigation and access to various music features. It provides a comprehensive library management system, enabling users to organize and categorize their music collection efficiently.

The app supports various audio formats, ensuring compatibility with a wide range of music files. Users can create custom playlists, shuffle tracks, and enjoy personalized recommendations based on their listening habits. Additionally, it offers a powerful equalizer with preset sound profiles and manual adjustments, allowing users to fine-tune their audio settings according to their preferences.

One notable feature of the ported Realme ColorOS Music app is its integration with online music services. Users can access a vast catalog of songs, stream music online, and discover new artists and albums directly within the app. It also supports downloading music for offline listening, providing flexibility for users with limited internet connectivity.

Overall, the ported Realme ColorOS Music app for AOSP ROMs brings the best of Realme's music experience to a wider user base. It combines an appealing user interface, advanced features, and seamless integration with online music services, enhancing the music playback capabilities of AOSP-based devices.
[read more]
